deep_dive.title: Game-Theoretic Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Swarm Trajectory Planning in Low-Altitude Wireless Networks
deep_dive.abstract: The Low-Altitude Economy (LAE) is rapidly expanding, giving rise to low-altitude wireless networks (LAWNs), where large-scale cellular-connected unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) deployments support heterogeneous mission-critical applications over multi-cell ground base station (GBS) infrastructures. To ensure mission success, each UAV must jointly optimize communication throughput and mission completion efficiency. In fifth-generation (5G) new radio (NR) systems, the equal resource block (RB) allocation policy induces strong strategic coupling among UAV trajectories: when a UAV enters a GBS cell, it reduces the RB share available to all co-served UAVs, thereby altering their achievable rates and trajectory incentives through shared wireless resources. Existing studies either ignore this coupling or focus on single-cell infrastructure, leaving the multi-cell, congestion-aware UAV trajectory planning problem insufficiently addressed. To fill this gap, we formulate the problem as a cooperative stochastic congestion game with a communication-and-mission-aware utility function, and propose a centralized-training decentralized-execution multi-agent proximal policy optimization (CTDE-MAPPO) algorithm to maximize social welfare under multi-cell RB congestion. Simulation results show that the proposed method outperforms QMIX, independent Q-learning, and random baselines in terms of aggregate utility and mission success rate, while achieving stable convergence within practical training budgets.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于博弈论的多智能体强化学习
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于博弈论的多智能体强化学习
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于博弈论的多智能体强化学习
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper proposes a game-theoretic multi-agent reinforcement learning approach for swarm trajectory planning in low-altitude wireless networks, addressing strategic coupling among UAVs.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 面向低空无线网络中大规模蜂窝连接无人机群体的轨迹规划，本文提出基于博弈论的多智能体强化学习（MARL）方法。由于基站资源块均分策略导致无人机轨迹间存在强策略耦合，传统方法难以应对。本文将每个无人机视为智能体，利用博弈论框架建模策略耦合，并采用MARL算法联合优化轨迹与调度。在5G NR系统下的仿真实验表明，该方法在通信吞吐量和任务完成效率上均优于现有基线，为低空经济中的无人机协调提供了可扩展的解决方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 面向低空无线网络中大规模蜂窝连接无人机群体的轨迹规划，本文提出基于博弈论的多智能体强化学习（MARL）方法。由于基站资源块均分策略导致无人机轨迹间存在强策略耦合，传统方法难以应对。本文将每个无人机视为智能体，利用博弈论框架建模策略耦合，并采用MARL算法联合优化轨迹与调度。在5G NR系统下的仿真实验表明，该方法在通信吞吐量和任务完成效率上均优于现有基线，为低空经济中的无人机协调提供了可扩展的解决方案。

quick_skim.title: Maximum Entropy Inverse Reinforcement Learning for Mean-Field Games with Average Reward
quick_skim.abstract: We study inverse reinforcement learning for discrete-time, infinite-horizon mean-field games (MFGs) under an average-reward criterion. Expert demonstrations are assumed to arise from a stationary mean-field equilibrium under an unknown reward, and the goal is to recover a policy explaining the observed behaviour via the maximum causal entropy principle. We formulate the inverse problem by enforcing consistency with the expert mean-field term and long-run feature expectations, treating two reward classes within a unified occupation-measure framework. For finite-dimensional linear rewards, we give a convex dual reformulation with an explicit log-partition objective, and prove smoothness and curvature properties justifying constant-step-size gradient descent. For infinite-dimensional RKHS rewards, we develop a Lagrangian relaxation whose inner-maximising policy is characterised by a soft Bellman equation. The main obstacle is the absence of a discount-factor contraction. We resolve this by introducing a minorisation-based sub-stochastic kernel that yields a strict contraction of the soft Bellman operator. We establish Fréchet differentiability and Lipschitz smoothness of the log-likelihood score, leading to a gradient ascent algorithm with convergence guarantees. Two numerical examples, a malware-spread MFG and an RKHS-based consumer-choice model, show that the recovered policies closely match expert behaviour.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: inverse RL for mean-field games, a Markov game variant
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 平均场博弈中的逆强化学习，属于马尔可夫博弈
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 平均场博弈中的逆强化学习，属于马尔可夫博弈
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 平均场博弈中的逆强化学习，属于马尔可夫博弈
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Studies maximum entropy inverse RL for infinite-horizon average-reward mean-field games, providing convex dual reformulation and convergence guarantees.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文研究平均场博弈中基于最大因果熵的逆强化学习，假设专家演示来自平稳平均场均衡。针对线性奖励函数提出凸对偶变分及其显式对数配分函数形式，证明光滑性和曲率性质，支持常数步镜像下降。该工作为大规模多智能体系统下的奖励学习提供理论基础，连接了逆强化学习与平均场博弈。但论文偏理论，未涉及实际MARL算法实验。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文研究平均场博弈中基于最大因果熵的逆强化学习，假设专家演示来自平稳平均场均衡。针对线性奖励函数提出凸对偶变分及其显式对数配分函数形式，证明光滑性和曲率性质，支持常数步镜像下降。该工作为大规模多智能体系统下的奖励学习提供理论基础，连接了逆强化学习与平均场博弈。但论文偏理论，未涉及实际MARL算法实验。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Markov games in multi-agent reinforcement learning
